mechanics.excerpt: Aside from acquiring information; Seduction can also used t0 gain trust; favors or preferential treatment in certain sit- uations_ It can also provide helpful foundation for the use of other SOC-related skills such as Fast Talk or Negotiation_ The use of such skills on previously seduced target would receive modifier of -1 3 , depending on how effective the seduc tion was RUNNING The Running Skill enables characters to run faster and far- ther than characters without the skill (see Movement; 110). Chases on foot can be resolved in the same way as vehi- cle chases see Piloting: p.
